compiled_state.title: Sprint epic selection skips displaying epic list before prompting
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: When /dso:sprint runs without a ticket ID, Phase 1 steps 2-3 require printing a numbered list of epics as visible text BEFORE asking for input. Instead, the orchestrator jumps to AskUserQuestion with 4 options, hiding blocked epics and the hidden-count note.
